betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The essence of Ascension. The matter of Recursion.
My magnum opus, the result of a technology that the Arbiter never knew.
Fractallite Ascension, isolated, into tangible matter. Matter exalted to the essence of Mission.
Mission that is now in the grasp of my hands. And from it knowledge. Of Mission.
Of Divinity. Not just power, not just dominion. Divinity, in the absolute sense. God, more or less.
The aspects of Divinity, made available to mortals, that is Ascension. An absolute Will, fragmented, divided in ways that can be grasped by us, so that we ourselves can become agents of Divinity.
An absolute Will, made into many missions, all contributing to evolving the universe. For better and for worse.
This power, by itself, it holds will, it encompasses a desire; but this will, this desire, it can be ignored, it can be instrumentalized, it can be weaponized.
And in all of this, a terrifying, yet beautiful in the way the might of nature is beautiful, amount of free will. The fact that, even when confronted with a Mission that is true and right, this Mission accepts its own refusal. Because if that were not to be the case, there would be no Mission, it would just be slavery.
For objective good and freedom to coexist, the concept of good must include one's ability to turn back, to forsake good, for actions to betray intentions.
And this, weight, this freedom, is now ever present. It frees me, and yet it weights upon me. The question will never be answered once and for all, it must be reiterated, repeated, recursively, forever.
And yet, even in a form so tangible, so material, much of the nature of Fractallites evades me.
Who is responsible for all of this?
Is this just a fact of the universe?
